title: Aandhi Station — live from the pass
prompt: A public page for a mountain weather station on the Thorong La pass that trekkers and guides check before crossing. It should feel alive — the mountain's weather as it happens.

direction.name: Blue hour instrument
direction.thesis: A night-sky public instrument, not a product: living wind and snow across the whole page, instrument-panel data set in light Sora and mono, and a plain-language verdict a guide can trust at 4 a.m.
direction.signature: The page IS the weather: a canvas of stars, moon, and wind-driven snow whose streak velocity tracks the live wind reading, while instruments tick and the station log appends itself.
